claims.text: We claim: 1. A compound of formula (I) ##STR37## wherein n is an integer of from 0 to 3; W is a group of formula (i), (ii), or (iii) ##STR38## wherein R is hydrogen or C 1-4 alkyl, X is --O--, --S--, ...
5. A method of treating or preventing migraine comprising administering to a patient in need of same an effective amount of a compound of claim 1.
5. A method of treating or preventing migraine comprising administering to a patient in need of same an effective amount of a compound of claim 1.
5. A method of treating or preventing migraine comprising administering to a patient in need of same an effective amount of a compound of claim 1.
9. A method of treating or preventing migraine comprising administering to a patient in need of same an effective amount of a compound of claim 8.
9. A method of treating or preventing migraine comprising administering to a patient in need of same an effective amount of a compound of claim 8.
9. A method of treating or preventing migraine comprising administering to a patient in need of same an effective amount of a compound of claim 8.

use_codes.desc: ACUTE TREATMENT OF MIGRAINE ATTACKS WITH OR WITHOUT AURA IN ADULTS
